why_kept_or_rejected: Best surviving empirical result after lag costs caps subperiod and benchmark checks with the cleanest attribution profile
implementation_expression: At each NBIM release hold the three largest disclosed industry exposures through sector ETF proxies until the next release and rebalance on the first tradable close after publication
current_best_evidence: N6 remains positive versus VT and ACWI and retains the strongest turnover-adjusted information ratio among the surviving positive strategies

why_kept_or_rejected: Best compact summary of what the system is detecting even when direct alpha evidence is modest
implementation_expression: Track PIF risk posture and NBIM sector posture jointly and update a current state table plus forward-return monitor after each disclosure cycle
current_best_evidence: States persist for weeks to months and technology-led states remain the clearest constructive family

why_kept_or_rejected: Best lower-beta cross-fund overlay idea even though it is not a strong alpha sleeve
implementation_expression: Use only as a cautious exposure-throttling and sector-posture reference; do not market it as a benchmark-beating standalone strategy
current_best_evidence: S1 stays positive versus cash and ACWV with downside capture below one but remains fragile as a market-alpha strategy

why_kept_or_rejected: Useful structurally but still negative against SPY and weaker than USMV on the expanded institutional benchmark layer
implementation_expression: Do not deploy as an alpha sleeve; keep only as an exposure-posture reference
current_best_evidence: The strategy improves on fully invested mirroring but remains benchmark-negative and statistically weak

why_kept_or_rejected: Economically positive and attractive on risk-adjusted metrics but still too dependent on concentration and too sensitive to realistic caps
implementation_expression: Use as a supporting research comparator rather than as the final preferred sleeve
current_best_evidence: Institutional benchmarks like N4 but the cap and attribution work still show too much reliance on concentrated winner episodes
